data.title: Implement real git version check + GIT_BINARY override throughout
data.description: Replace check_git_version() stub from T3a-impl with real implementation in plugins/dso/scripts/apply-attribution-trailers.sh. Contract: check_git_version uses 'return' (NOT 'exit') so set -euo pipefail does not abort the script. Returns non-zero + emits 'TRAILER_SKIPPED' to stderr when git < 2.6. Strips vendor suffixes (e.g., 2.39.3-1.el9 -> 2.39.3). Apply ${GIT_BINARY:-git} to ALL git calls throughout the script. Create mock for tests: printf '#!/bin/bash\necho "git version X.Y.Z"\n' > /tmp/fake-git-$$; chmod +x /tmp/fake-git-$$; GIT_BINARY=/tmp/fake-git-$$. AC: (1) check_git_version returns non-zero + TRAILER_SKIPPED on stderr for git 1.9.0 mock; (2) returns 0 for 2.6.0, 2.42.0, 2.39.3-1.el9; (3) all git calls use ${GIT_BINARY:-git}; (4) all T6-test tests pass; (5) validate.sh --ci passes.
